summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Project Atlas banking platform. Backend APIs are 96.3% functional with card requests and transfers working correctly. Frontend has critical integration issues: card ordering and transfer modals exist but are not accessible from UI, and admin card/transfer queue components are not integrated into admin dashboard.

minor_bugs.impact: Users cannot view notifications, but doesn't block core card/transfer workflows

integration_issues.issue: CardOrderingModal component exists but there is no 'Order Card' button on CardsPage to trigger it. Page only shows a hardcoded card with management options.
integration_issues.impact: Users cannot order new cards through the UI, blocking the card ordering workflow

integration_issues.issue: NewTransferModal component exists but TransfersPage shows P2PTransferForm instead. The IBAN-based transfer modal is not accessible.
integration_issues.impact: Users cannot make IBAN-based transfers through the NewTransferModal, only P2P transfers

integration_issues.issue: AdminCardRequestsQueue component exists but is not imported or integrated into admin dashboard. No way for admin to view/fulfill card requests.
integration_issues.impact: Admin cannot access card requests queue, blocking the card fulfillment workflow

integration_issues.issue: AdminTransfersQueue component exists but is not imported or integrated into admin dashboard. No way for admin to view/approve/reject transfers.
integration_issues.impact: Admin cannot access transfers queue, blocking the transfer approval workflow

passed_tests: Admin ledger operations (top-up, withdraw, charge fee)
Admin sidebar shows all 8 sections (Users, KYC Queue, Accounts, Ledger Tools, Transactions, Support, Audit, Settings)

success_percentage.integration: 0% (Card ordering and transfer workflows not accessible)

critical_fixes_required.issue: Add 'Order Card' button to CardsPage that triggers CardOrderingModal
critical_fixes_required.details: The CardOrderingModal component exists and is imported, but there's no button to open it. Need to add a button (e.g., '+ Order New Card') and state management to show/hide the modal.

critical_fixes_required.issue: Integrate NewTransferModal into TransfersPage or create separate page for IBAN transfers
critical_fixes_required.details: TransfersPage currently only shows P2PTransferForm. Need to either add NewTransferModal alongside it or create a way to switch between P2P and IBAN-based transfers.

critical_fixes_required.issue: Add 'Card Requests' section to admin sidebar and integrate AdminCardRequestsQueue component
critical_fixes_required.details:
1. Import AdminCardRequestsQueue in App.js
2. Add 'card_requests' menu item to AdminLayout sidebar
3. Add case in renderContent() to show AdminCardRequestsQueue component
4. This will allow admin to view pending card requests and fulfill/reject them

critical_fixes_required.issue: Add 'Transfers Queue' section to admin sidebar and integrate AdminTransfersQueue component
critical_fixes_required.details:
1. Import AdminTransfersQueue in App.js
2. Add 'transfers_queue' menu item to AdminLayout sidebar
3. Add case in renderContent() to show AdminTransfersQueue component
4. This will allow admin to view pending transfers and approve/reject them

minor_fixes.details: GET /api/v1/notifications returns 520 error. Check notification service implementation and error handling.
